arts.sum: Four members of the reserve setup at La Liga giants Barcelona played their part in first-team training on Friday. This comes with a view to Barca’s trip to Celta Vigo…

arts.ttl: Brest’s Pierre Lees-Melou injured ahead of Barcelona Champions League clash
arts.sum: Stade Brestois have suffered a potentially consequential injury blow ahead of Tuesday’s UEFA Champions League encounter against Barcelona with Pierre Lees-Melou (31) going off injured during Friday night’s Ligue 1…

arts.ttl: Lionel Messi to miss Barcelona’s 125th anniversary celebration
arts.sum: Barcelona legend Lionel Messi will not be in attendance at the club’s upcoming anniversary celebration. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who have on Friday provided an insight into the latest…

arts.ttl: 1 in, 2 out: Celta Vigo injury latest before Barcelona
arts.sum: An update on the fitness situation in the first-team ranks of Celta Vigo has on Friday been provided. The info comes courtesy of Mundo Deportivo, who point towards mixed news…

arts.ttl: Robert Lewandowski 'proud' to have played at the same time as Lionel Messi & Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski's career has been somewhat overshadowed by the likes of Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo.

arts.ttl: Barcelona youngster wants increase in playing time
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Pablo Torre is eager for an uptick in playing time moving forward. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing Jijantes, who have on Friday provided an insight into the…

arts.ttl: Another former Barcelona teammate of Lionel Messi set for Inter Miami as head coach
arts.sum: According to Argentinian journalist Cesar Luis Merlo and multiple reports from Miami, the 40-year-old has been chosen by the club’s management to replace Martino as head coach and to lead Inter Miami into a new era, featuring stars like Messi, Suárez, Busquets, and Jordi Alba, former teammates of his at Barcelona. Inter Miami is back in the headlines with an exciting and eye-catching new signing, but this time it’s for the coaching position .

arts.ttl: Barcelona handed timely injury boost ahead of hectic festive period
arts.sum: La Liga table-toppers Barcelona have this week been afforded some altogether timely positive news on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that Ronald Araújo is set for an imminent…

arts.ttl: Romano CONFIRMS Messi's shock Barcelona reunion
arts.sum: Martino, himself formerly the coach of Atlanta United, had managed to turn Inter Miami from MLS also-rans into one of the best teams in the league in the space of a little over a year, helped, of course, by Lionel Messi, Luis Suarez, Sergio Busquets and Jordi Alba. According to Cesar Luis Merlo and since confirmed by Fabrizio Romano, Inter Miami are set to appoint Javier Mascherano as their new head coach.
